title: 6 Pack Knitted Christmas Stockings, Red Green White Large Knitted Xmas Hanging Stockings Decorations with Name Tags for Christmas Family Fireplace Decorations Socks
features: Value Set: You'll receive six Christmas stockings featuring distinct knitted textures, available in two sizes and paired in red, green and white. These seamlessly complement any festive decor theme, adding an air of refined elegance to your Christmas celebrations. Included are 6 blank wooden name tags and a roll of jute twine, allowing you to personalize each stocking with family names or unique designs. Create a joyful and warm atmosphere with family, friends, or colleagues on Christmas Eve!

Spacious Capacity: The large Xmas stocking measures 18 in/ 46 cm in length with a cuff width of 5.5 in/ 14 cm; The small Christmas stocking measures 15 in/ 38 cm in length with a 5.5 in/ 14 cm cuff width; the wooden tag dimensions are 12 x 3 x 0.15 cm/4.72 x 1.18 x 0.06 in. With its generous capacity and spacious interior, it accommodates all manner of Christmas presents, making it ideal for gift-wrapping and presenting to loved ones.

Quality Material: Christmas Knitted stockings are made of high-quality soft acrylic fabric, soft , elastic,strong. The classic double-knit texture, both rustic and elegant, creates a beautifully shaped sock. Infuse your home with warmth and joy, adding an aesthetic Christmas decoration to your living space.

Exquisite Patterns: Exquisitely crafted patterns designed specifically for Christmas decorations, boasting six distinct knitted patterns including braided, stripes, honeycomb, and diamond patterns. Traditional color schemes complement the refined textures, creating a truly exquisite piece that infuses classic elements into your Christmas decorations, welcoming the festive season ahead.

Wide application: Christmas stockings are suitable for hanging fireplaces mantel, windows, wall, doors,banister,Christmas Tree, hotel, club, bar and so on.Christmas Stockings are large enough for small items, candies or cookies, watch, folding wallet, ties, cards, small toy cars, etc.
